parameters.query:
-- Check if emergency or conservative mode is active
SELECT 
  (SELECT is_active FROM emergency_state WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY activated_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS emergency_active,
  (SELECT locked_by FROM workflow_locks WHERE lock_name = 'conservative_mode' AND expires_at > NOW()) AS conservative_mode,
  (SELECT locked_by FROM workflow_locks WHERE lock_name = 'bid_change' AND expires_at > NOW()) AS bid_lock_holder;

-- Acquire distributed lock for bid changes (5 min TTL)
INSERT INTO workflow_locks (lock_name, locked_by, locked_at, expires_at)
VALUES ('bid_change', 'smart_bidder', NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
ON CONFLICT (lock_name) DO UPDATE 
  SET locked_by = 'smart_bidder', locked_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes'
  WHERE workflow_locks.expires_at < NOW() OR workflow_locks.locked_by = 'smart_bidder';

SELECT locked_by FROM workflow_locks WHERE lock_name = 'bid_change' AND locked_by = 'smart_bidder';

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue FROM leads WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) GROUP BY param5

SELECT ad_id, ROUND(AVG(position), 1) AS avg_position, MIN(position) AS best_position, COUNT(*) AS scans FROM position_tracking WHERE scanned_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ad_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ad_id
SELECT country_code, country_name, geo_id, avg_payout, avg_approval, max_cpl, min_bid, max_bid FROM geo_payouts WHERE is_active = TRUE
SELECT ad_id, old_bid, new_bid, rule_applied, changed_at FROM bid_history WHERE changed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY ad_id, changed_at DESC

SELECT ad_id, state, state_changed_at, warmup_phase, escalation_level, escalation_failures, bid_changes_today, bid_changes_reset_date, cumulative_bid_change_today, last_bid_change_at FROM teasers WHERE state NOT IN ('dead', 'stopped', 'banned')

-- Log bid change
INSERT INTO bid_history (ad_id, old_bid, new_bid, reason, rule_applied, roi_at_change, clicks_at_change)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  {{ $json.current_bid }},
  {{ $json.new_bid || $json.current_bid }},
  '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.action }}_L{{ $json.escalation_level || 0 }}',
  {{ $json.cpl || 0 }},
  {{ $json.clicks }}
);

-- Update teaser state
UPDATE teasers SET
  last_bid_change_at = NOW(),
  bid_changes_today = CASE WHEN bid_changes_reset_date = CURRENT_DATE THEN bid_changes_today + 1 ELSE 1 END,
  bid_changes_reset_date = CURRENT_DATE,
  escalation_level = {{ $json.escalation_level || 0 }},
  warmup_phase = {{ $json.warmup_phase >= 0 ? $json.warmup_phase : 'warmup_phase' }},
  state = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.action }}' = 'STOP' THEN 'stopped'
    WHEN {{ $json.warmup_phase || -1 }} >= 0 THEN 'testing'
    WHEN {{ $json.escalation_level || 0 }} >= 3 THEN 'paused_high_cpl'
    ELSE state
  END,
  state_changed_at = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.action }}' = 'STOP' THEN NOW()
    WHEN {{ $json.escalation_level || 0 }} >= 3 THEN NOW()
    ELSE state_changed_at
  END,
  state_reason = '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ad_id = {{ $json.ad_id }};

INSERT INTO bid_rollback_snapshots (ad_id, snapshot_bid, snapshot_cpl, snapshot_ctr)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  {{ $json.snapshot_bid }},
  {{ $json.snapshot_cpl || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.snapshot_ctr || 'NULL' }}
);

-- Also create bid expectation for feedback loop
INSERT INTO bid_expectations (ad_id, old_bid, new_bid, action, expected_metric, expected_direction, baseline_value, measurement_window_hours)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  {{ $json.snapshot_bid }},
  {{ $json.snapshot_bid }},
  'bid_change',
  'cpl',
  'down',
  {{ $json.snapshot_cpl || 0 }},
  4
);

-- Release the bid change lock
DELETE FROM workflow_locks WHERE lock_name = 'bid_change' AND locked_by = 'smart_bidder';
